categories.description: Default loadout at default tuning — the reference ship.

scenarios.name: Reference ship
scenarios.description: Pioneer hull, Epoch-S, DR-505, VRS Mk I, Aegis Beta, Nav Tier 3. All tuning at 1.0.

categories.description: Verify each tuning param only affects its own system. Compare against baseline.

scenarios.name: Baseline (all 1.0)
scenarios.description: Reference point for isolation checks.

scenarios.name: Throttle only (2.0)
scenarios.description: Only throttle changed. Scan and shield should be identical to baseline.

scenarios.name: Effort only (2.0)
scenarios.description: Only effort changed. Jump and shield should be identical to baseline.

scenarios.name: Priority only (2.0)
scenarios.description: Only priority changed. Jump and scan should be identical to baseline.

categories.description: Jump metrics at varying throttle levels. Default loadout.

scenarios.name: throttle=0.5
scenarios.description: Default loadout at throttle 0.5. Limp-home: zero core cost.

scenarios.name: throttle=1
scenarios.description: Default loadout at throttle 1.

scenarios.name: throttle=1.5
scenarios.description: Default loadout at throttle 1.5.

scenarios.name: throttle=2
scenarios.description: Default loadout at throttle 2.

categories.description: Scan metrics at varying effort levels. Default loadout.

scenarios.name: effort=0.5
scenarios.description: Default loadout at effort 0.5. Duration scales linearly, chance capped at base.

scenarios.name: effort=1
scenarios.description: Default loadout at effort 1. Duration scales linearly, chance capped at base.

scenarios.name: effort=1.5
scenarios.description: Default loadout at effort 1.5. Duration scales linearly, chance capped at base.

scenarios.name: effort=2
scenarios.description: Default loadout at effort 2. Duration scales linearly, chance capped at base.

categories.description: Shield metrics at varying priority levels. Default loadout.

scenarios.name: priority=0.5
scenarios.description: Default loadout at priority 0.5. Regen and draw scale linearly.

scenarios.name: priority=1
scenarios.description: Default loadout at priority 1. Regen and draw scale linearly.

scenarios.name: priority=1.5
scenarios.description: Default loadout at priority 1.5. Regen and draw scale linearly.

scenarios.name: priority=2
scenarios.description: Default loadout at priority 2. Regen and draw scale linearly.

categories.description: Ship-physics Section 4 constraints. Capacitor=100. Comfort jump=7ly (56 power), comfort scan=5ly (10 power).

scenarios.name: Comfort-range jump power cost
scenarios.description: Jump 7ly costs 56 power = 56% of capacitor. Target: 50-70%.

scenarios.name: Comfort-range scan power cost
scenarios.description: Scan 5ly costs 10 power = 10% of capacitor. Target: should not deplete.

scenarios.name: Jump + scan back-to-back
scenarios.description: Combined 66 power = 66% of capacitor. Target: should exceed capacity.

scenarios.name: Shield draw vs regen
scenarios.description: Shield draw=5, core regen=10/hr. Regen should outpace draw when idle.

categories.description: All 9 core x drive combinations. Default sensor/shield/nav, pioneer hull.

scenarios.name: epoch_e + dr_305
scenarios.description: Core output=0.9, drive consumption=0.6. perfRatio=min(1, 0.9/0.6).

scenarios.name: epoch_e + dr_505
scenarios.description: Core output=0.9, drive consumption=1. perfRatio=min(1, 0.9/1).

scenarios.name: epoch_e + dr_705
scenarios.description: Core output=0.9, drive consumption=1.5. perfRatio=min(1, 0.9/1.5).

scenarios.name: epoch_s + dr_305
scenarios.description: Core output=1, drive consumption=0.6. perfRatio=min(1, 1/0.6).

scenarios.name: epoch_s + dr_505
scenarios.description: Core output=1, drive consumption=1. perfRatio=min(1, 1/1).

scenarios.name: epoch_s + dr_705
scenarios.description: Core output=1, drive consumption=1.5. perfRatio=min(1, 1/1.5).

scenarios.name: epoch_r + dr_305
scenarios.description: Core output=1.1, drive consumption=0.6. perfRatio=min(1, 1.1/0.6).

scenarios.name: epoch_r + dr_505
scenarios.description: Core output=1.1, drive consumption=1. perfRatio=min(1, 1.1/1).

scenarios.name: epoch_r + dr_705
scenarios.description: Core output=1.1, drive consumption=1.5. perfRatio=min(1, 1.1/1.5).

categories.description: All 3 sensors with default loadout. Shows comfort range, chance, duration differentiation.

scenarios.name: dsc_mk1
scenarios.description: DSC Mk I: sustain=7, chance=0.6, durationMult=2.

scenarios.name: vrs_mk1
scenarios.description: VRS Mk I: sustain=5, chance=0.7, durationMult=1.

scenarios.name: acu_mk1
scenarios.description: ACU Mk I: sustain=3, chance=0.85, durationMult=0.5.

scenarios.description: Aegis Beta: rate=10, capacity=100, draw=5.

scenarios.description: Aegis Beta: rate=10, capacity=100, draw=5.

categories.description: How many 5ly jumps before core death at throttle 1.0, and verification of zero cost at throttle 0.5.

scenarios.name: epoch_e + dr_305 @ throttle=1.0
scenarios.description: 5ly jumps before core death: 444. Core life=1000, cost/jump=2.25.

scenarios.name: epoch_e + dr_505 @ throttle=1.0
scenarios.description: 5ly jumps before core death: 266. Core life=1000, cost/jump=3.75.

scenarios.name: epoch_e + dr_705 @ throttle=1.0
scenarios.description: 5ly jumps before core death: 103. Core life=1000, cost/jump=9.71.

scenarios.name: epoch_s + dr_305 @ throttle=1.0
scenarios.description: 5ly jumps before core death: 250. Core life=750, cost/jump=3.00.

scenarios.name: epoch_s + dr_505 @ throttle=1.0
scenarios.description: 5ly jumps before core death: 150. Core life=750, cost/jump=5.00.

scenarios.name: epoch_s + dr_705 @ throttle=1.0
scenarios.description: 5ly jumps before core death: 79. Core life=750, cost/jump=9.38.

scenarios.name: epoch_r + dr_305 @ throttle=1.0
scenarios.description: 5ly jumps before core death: 111. Core life=500, cost/jump=4.50.

scenarios.name: epoch_r + dr_505 @ throttle=1.0
scenarios.description: 5ly jumps before core death: 66. Core life=500, cost/jump=7.50.

scenarios.name: epoch_r + dr_705 @ throttle=1.0
scenarios.description: 5ly jumps before core death: 42. Core life=500, cost/jump=11.90.

categories.description: All 4 hulls with default loadout. Shows how hull choice affects power budget and cargo.

scenarios.name: pioneer
scenarios.description: Pioneer Frame: space=300, power=100, shields=100.

scenarios.name: scout
scenarios.description: Scout Hull: space=250, power=80, shields=75.

scenarios.name: surveyor
scenarios.description: Surveyor Hull: space=325, power=100, shields=100.

scenarios.name: combat
scenarios.description: Combat Hull: space=350, power=120, shields=150.

scenarios.name: DR-705 + Epoch-E (worst perfRatio)
scenarios.description: perfRatio = min(1.0, 0.9/1.5) = 0.6. Lowest efficiency combo — verify usable numbers.

scenarios.name: Aegis Gamma @ priority=2.0 (highest draw)
scenarios.description: draw=16 at priority 2.0. Check draw vs capacitor headroom.

scenarios.name: Aegis Gamma @ priority=3.0 (max specialization)
scenarios.description: Rapid Recovery specialization max. draw=24 at priority 3.0.

scenarios.name: Scout hull (smallest capacitor)
scenarios.description: powerMax=80. Tighter power budget — check if constraints still hold.

scenarios.name: Combat hull (largest capacitor)
scenarios.description: powerMax=120. Most headroom — check power budget ratios.

scenarios.name: All economy (Epoch-E + DR-305 + ACU Mk I + Aegis Alpha)
scenarios.description: Cheapest, most efficient components. Maximum range, minimum performance.

scenarios.name: All performance (Epoch-R + DR-705 + DSC Mk I + Aegis Gamma)
scenarios.description: Highest performance components. Maximum speed, minimum efficiency.
